nodes.name: analyst.md
nodes.summary: BMad Business Analyst agent (Mary) definition covering market research, brainstorming, competitive analysis, and project brief creation.

nodes.name: architect.md
nodes.summary: BMad Architect agent (Winston) definition for holistic system design, architecture documents, technology selection, and infrastructure planning.

nodes.name: bmad-master.md
nodes.summary: BMad Master agent definition serving as an all-in-one single-agent persona that can embody any BMad role on demand.

nodes.name: bmad-orchestrator.md
nodes.summary: BMad Web Orchestrator agent definition that coordinates multi-agent workflows and guides users through planning and execution phases.

nodes.name: dev.md
nodes.summary: BMad Full Stack Developer agent (James) definition that implements stories task-by-task with strict constraints on which story sections it may modify.

nodes.name: pm.md
nodes.summary: BMad Product Manager agent (John) definition for creating PRDs, epics, product strategy, and roadmap documentation.

nodes.name: po.md
nodes.summary: BMad Product Owner agent (Sarah) definition focused on backlog management, story refinement, artifact validation, and sprint planning.

nodes.name: qa.md
nodes.summary: BMad Test Architect agent (Quinn) definition providing advisory quality gates, risk assessment, NFR validation, and test design without blocking progress.

nodes.name: sm.md
nodes.summary: BMad Scrum Master agent (Bob) definition specialized in creating detailed, actionable user stories for developer agents using create-next-story task.

nodes.name: ux-expert.md
nodes.summary: BMad UX Expert agent (Sally) definition for UI/UX design, wireframes, front-end specifications, and AI UI generation prompts.
